one_time_description: Correction of prior year tangible capital asset net book value error of $1,063,812 recognized as expense in current year rather than restated retroactively
economic_notes: Band owns interests in multiple LPs including LNIB Aggregates LP (pipeline/aggregate), Shulus Forest Enterprises LP (forestry), LNIB Ventures LP (revenue sharing), Shulus Farms LP (hay cultivation), Tunkwa Lake Resort Ltd. (acquired October 2022, cabins/fishing boats). LNIB Aggregates LP has 50.99% interest in Ogilvie Mountain Holdings LP and Lower Nicola Site Services LP engaged in pipeline maintenance and construction. Shulus Electricity Transmission Line LP (Alberta) had no activity.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED on three bases: (1) prior year TCA error of $1,063,812 corrected in current year rather than retroactively restated; (2) PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations not adopted as required effective April 1, 2022 - impact unquantifiable; (3) investment in LNIB Aggregates LP carried at $22,617,231 with $8,280,043 share of income - auditors unable to obtain sufficient evidence on these amounts. Two fully consolidated subsidiaries: LNIB Development Corporation and 1374678 B.C. Ltd. Seven GBEs on modified equity basis. Tunkwa Lake Resort Ltd. acquired October 14, 2022 for $4,665,330 with purchase premium of $1,972,834 amortized over 20 years. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + CMHC + FNHA + FNESC + Province of BC + BC First Nations Gaming. OSR includes property taxes, housing/rental, interest, other contract revenue, and income from enterprises. No remuneration schedule visible in provided text.
